markdownRemark.html:
How to care for young people

  • Show them that the church life fulfills their needs (family, sustenance, appreciation/care)
  • Show that Christ meets their needs (attract them through the proper humanity)
  • "Teach them to fish" -> Love the Word and seek Him
  • Avoid teaching them to be disingenuous

Raising up children

  • Matthew 18:6 is very applicable for parents raising up children in the church life

    • Parents are the ones who most at risk of stumbling their children
